scenario.name: reg_xgbver_2016_compat
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=z9hG4bK[callId] From: <sip:34020000001320000001@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag03[callNumber] To: <sip:34020000001320000001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] REGISTER Contact: <sip:34020000001320000001@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: WVP-Test-Simulator-2016 Expires: 3600
